name: Roy Underhill
bio: American craftsman and television host best known for The Woodwright's Shop. Author of multiple books on hand-tool woodworking.

name: Paul Sellers
bio: British master woodworker, educator, and author. Known for teaching traditional hand-tool techniques to beginners.

name: Jennifer Noonan
bio: Event planning consultant and author of guides for milestone celebration coordination.

name: Rick Bayless
bio: American chef and cookbook author specializing in traditional Mexican cuisine. Host of Mexico: One Plate at a Time.
top_work: Mexico: One Plate at a Time

name: The Editors of Popular Mechanics
bio: The editorial team behind Popular Mechanics magazine, covering home improvement, tools, automotive, and technology since 1902.
top_work: Popular Mechanics Complete Car Care Manual

name: Mary Luz Mejia
bio: Food writer and author specializing in Latin American home cooking and culinary tradition.
